endpoints.name: GET /v1/Content
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of Contents belonging to the account used to make the request
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Content/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a Content resource by its unique Content Sid
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Content/{Sid}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Content/{Sid}/ApprovalRequests
endpoints.description: Fetch a Content resource's approval status by its unique Content Sid
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/ContentAndApprovals
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of Contents with approval statuses belonging to the account used to make the request
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/LegacyContent
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of Legacy Contents belonging to the account used to make the request
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.
